title: 連仔，你好似夠期要去下旅行. Mr. Lin, it's time to travel.

replies.msg:
Hi 連仔，聽講你同你班員工平時慣左久唔久要去外國剪頭髮，話香港個邊e 輪d 洗頭技術唔係幾好，洗洗下個人會迷失左唔知去左邊，同埋你剪完仲會睇心情，放個悠長假期。

我朋友講E輪你頭髮應該幾長下，你同你班it 手足應該各自唔同時間去下唔同國家剪下頭髮，去下悠長假期。仲有如果你地去上癮，需要直接移民其實都十分合理ga，我諗大家都會好支持你地，始終可能係全香港最自由ga 地方係需要有新靈感，不停升級 ga.

例如諗下，搞下
1. Google authenticator - 2 step verification
2. VPN services
3. 清除瀏覽記錄
4. 刪除帳戶功能
5. isp email 註冊後容許轉去Gmail., delete account ,
6. Embedded auto Google translate,
7. 賣下海外電話prepaid card 阿
8. 升級下sever 阿，256 bit 防護個d 阿，搬sever. 去美國阿
9. 收下月費阿，大家都知免費野永遠最貴

大把錢可以比你賺嫁。

最後，見你平時整個d 狗仔 emoji , 咁得意，你想去旅行如果又無錢的話，你放條眾籌link ，我地資助你同你班it 手足又點話，始終大家都明你地幾咁重要。

利伸，我又借左人account. 英文translation 一陣補
我好中意去旅行，打十次
好中意去旅行，打十次

連仔好中意去旅行
第三次

連仔下次打機 有緣再同公會
我會比多d錢你課金
我真係好中意去旅行
連仔係時候去個旅行

我屋企可以開放俾連仔住。
利申：非gay
如果你個不孝子擲低左四大長老已經遠遊緊，我都唔介意請埋長老去旅行嫁

我打英文translation 先

你地幫手推下

連仔記住連坐法，邀請埋長老們歎世界阿

同埋唔好搏，平息之後，打算返黎香港剪頭髮。

好對唔住，但我諗你，絕對無可能唔洗叫雞

Isp email好似hash咗，目前問題唔大，唔del得否則唔知道有無用作重複申請。
不過可以考慮轉做俾人用第二個email登入，唔好用返登記嗰個。

Hi Mr. Lin, I heard that you and your it dog bros are used to have haircut overseas since you believed that the hairdresser here sucks at washing hair. You also believe that there is a rumor that you will get lost for no reason if you have a haircut here. Other than the haircut, I heard that you will have a long holiday after the haircut.


My friend just told me that your and your bro's hair is quite messy now. It's high time for you and your mates to experience different haircut styles in different countries and times not to mention to have a nice holiday. And if you guys are addicted to it, that arouses your interest to immigrate permanently for the sake of a well haircut in long term. We all believe that is really reasonable to you guys since this possibly the only forum with freedom of speech in HK managed by you guys always needs upgrades and new ideas as following examples :


1. 2 step verification with Google authenticator
2. VPN services
3. clearing account activity record
4. deleting the account.
5. change of email from isp email to Gmail
6. Embedded auto translation for foreigners
7. Selling foregin prepaid card services
8. upgrading the sever protection and moving the sever to the states. e.g. 256 bit password security
9. Monthly subscription ( we all the know the free goods are the most expensive good)

You can earn a lot of money through that, mate

Since your lihkg dog series emoji are quite adorable , I wouldn't mind to sponsor you and your mates to travel for a while assuming you don't have enough money since we all know how important you guys are


Above is the English translation of the post. (The translation may not be 100% correct due to the time limitation. Please compare with Google translate as well if you are interested.)
